positive: Stylized minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest: giant, bioluminescent mushrooms glowing sapphire and emerald green, intertwined with slender, stylized crystalline trees emitting soft neon lavender light. The composition features strong vertical elements and clean silhouettes. Scattered glowing motes of stardust fill the void, creating depth. High contrast, deep shadows offset by vibrant, saturated light sources. Perfect for central placement on apparel. Vector art style, vaporwave aesthetic, ultra detailed, highly rendered, clean lines, ethereal, symmetrical, 8k, dramatic backlighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, noise, low resolution, ugly, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, disfigured
